sentences.english: My best friend's name is Sarah.
sentences.korean: 내 가장 친한 친구 이름은 세라예요.

sentences.english: We met in elementary school when we were seven years old.
She is kind and always makes me laugh.
sentences.korean: 그녀는 친절하고 항상 나를 웃게 해요.

sentences.english: We like to go shopping together on weekends.
sentences.korean: 주말에 같이 쇼핑 가는 걸 좋아해요.

sentences.english: Even when we disagree about something we always work it out.
sentences.korean: 뭔가에 대해 의견이 달라도 항상 해결해요.
